headline: Western Digital Books HDD Capacity Through 2026 On AI Data Center Demand
summary: Western Digital has reported that its long term hard disk drive capacity is fully booked through 2026. Multi year contracts are locking in HDD supply for customers, linked to rising storage needs from AI focused data centers. The company is positioning its HDD business around large scale cloud and AI workloads that require high capacity storage. Western Digital, traded as NasdaqGS:WDC, is drawing fresh attention as the market reacts to its fully booked HDD capacity and new multi year deals...
